title: Agentic Workspace Local Delegation Outcomes
description: Local delegation outcome log used to tune target-profile recommendations.

kind.description: Discriminator identifying the payload or record shape.

recorded_at.description: Recorded at text value used by this contract.

delegation_target.description: Delegation target text value used by this contract.

task_class.description: Task class text value used by this contract.

scope_class.description: Independent scope class text value used by this contract.

operation.description: Evidence lifecycle operation represented by this record.

record_id.description: Stable local record id used by lifecycle transitions.

predecessor_id.description: Prior record id corrected, superseded, disputed, or compacted by this record.

authority.description: Authority class for the admitted local evidence.

confidence.description: Confidence classification for the admitted local evidence.

admission_state.description: Admission state controlling whether routing may consume this record.

outcome.description: Observed or intended outcome for this entry.

handoff_sufficiency.description: Allowed handoff sufficiency value for routing or validation.

review_burden.description: Allowed review burden value for routing or validation.

escalation_required.description: Escalation required true/false policy flag used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the records list.

records.description: Ordered records entries used by this contract.
